narrative: A group has waited patiently for access to a shared service, and one person cuts to the front after seeing that no attendant is watching. Speaking up may delay everyone briefly and create tension, but staying silent allows the unfair move to succeed.
high_response: I will speak up and ask them to return to their place. Even if it causes a delay, unfair behavior should not be rewarded when everyone else followed the same rule.
low_response: I will avoid confronting them and let the line move on. The unfairness is annoying, but creating tension over one incident may cost more than it is worth.
